languages.text: This {g|Encyclopedia:Ability}ability{/g} affects both allies and enemies: Allies: {g|Encyclopedia:Recoil}recoil{/g} is reduced by half for 1 {g|Encyclopedia:Round}round{/g}. Allies' {g|Encyclopedia:DodgeGlossary}dodge{/g} is increased by +{uip|Percent|a01295a67a9a46579e46c3073d6a9aa9}% for 1 round. Enemies: dodge is reduced by −{uip|Percent|a01295a67a9a46579e46c3073d6a9aa9}% for 1 round. Enemies must pass an {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerIntelligence}Intelligence{/g} {g|Encyclopedia:ResistanceTest}resistance test{/g} or suffer +1 stack of {g|f:e6ed7e168bfb4adb9fc73fb07b5e7020}сonvulsion{/g} until the end of combat. If the target has the {g|f:ed0acc1731834a89bda8cc52ec769e3d}Reject the Flesh{/g} or {g|f:780497b04a0944e59cb57e68bb9775c4}Ferrum Sanctum{/g} feature, or if the target is a mechanism or a machine, it makes a check with a −{uip|Penalty|a01295a67a9a46579e46c3073d6a9aa9} {g|Encyclopedia:Penalty}penalty{/g}.
languages.original_text:
Allies and enemies gains the following bonuses and penalty:
Allies' weapon {g|Encyclopedia:Recoil}recoil{/g} is reduced by half for 1 round.
Allies' {g|Encyclopedia:DodgeGlossary}dodge{/g} is increased by +{uip|Percent|a01295a67a9a46579e46c3073d6a9aa9}% for 1 round.
Enemies' dodge is reduced by -{uip|Percent|a01295a67a9a46579e46c3073d6a9aa9}% for 1 round.
Enemies must pass an {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerIntelligence}Intelligence{/g} {g|Encyclopedia:ResistanceTest}resistance test{/g} or suffer +1 stack of {g|f:e6ed7e168bfb4adb9fc73fb07b5e7020}Convulsion{/g} until the end of combat. If the target has {g|f:ed0acc1731834a89bda8cc52ec769e3d}Reject the Flesh{/g} or {g|f:780497b04a0944e59cb57e68bb9775c4}Ferrum Sanctum{/g} feature, or it the target is a mechanism or a machine, it makes a check with a -{uip|Penalty|a01295a67a9a46579e46c3073d6a9aa9} penalty.

traits.locale_text: All weapons in a huge area gain additional effects: Ally weapons: the recoil is reduced by half for Tech-Priest's INT bonus rounds and the dodge chance of the targets is decreased by −(2 × INT bonus)% for (1 + INT bonus) rounds. Enemy weapons: the recoil is increased by half for Tech-Priest's INT bonus rounds and the dodge chance of the targets is increased by +(2 × INT bonus)% for (1 + INT bonus) rounds.

This {g|Encyclopedia:Ability}ability{/g} affects both allies and enemies: Allies: {g|Encyclopedia:Recoil}recoil{/g} is reduced by half for 1 {g|Encyclopedia:Round}round{/g}. Allies' {g|Encyclopedia:DodgeGlossary}dodge{/g} is increased by +{uip|Percent|a01295a67a9a46579e46c3073d6a9aa9}% for 1 round. Enemies must pass an {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerIntelligence}Intelligence{/g} {g|Encyclopedia:ResistanceTest}resistance test{/g} or suffer +1 stack of {g|f:e6ed7e168bfb4adb9fc73fb07b5e7020}сonvulsion{/g} until the end of combat. If the target has the {g|f:ed0acc1731834a89bda8cc52ec769e3d}Reject the Flesh{/g} or {g|f:780497b04a0944e59cb57e68bb9775c4}Ferrum Sanctum{/g} feature, or if the target is a mechanism or a machine, it makes a check with a −{uip|Penalty|a01295a67a9a46579e46c3073d6a9aa9} {g|Encyclopedia:Penalty}penalty{/g}.

All weapons in a huge area gain additional effects: Allies' Weapons: {g|Encyclopedia:Recoil}recoil{/g} is reduced by half for Tech-Priest's {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerIntelligence}INT{/g} {g|Encyclopedia:Bonus}bonus{/g} rounds. Enemies suffer a −(2 × INT bonus)% penalty to {g|Encyclopedia:DodgeGlossary}dodge{/g} for (1 + INT bonus) rounds. Enemies' Weapons: recoil is increased by half for Tech-Priest's INT bonus rounds. Allies gain +(2 × INT bonus)% increased dodge for (1 + INT bonus) rounds.

All weapons in a huge area gain additional effects: Allies' Weapons: {g|Encyclopedia:Recoil}recoil{/g} is reduced by half for {uip|Round|a01295a67a9a46579e46c3073d6a9aa9} rounds. Enemies suffer a −(2 × INT bonus)% penalty to {g|Encyclopedia:DodgeGlossary}dodge{/g} for (1 + INT bonus) rounds. Enemies' Weapons: recoil is increased by half for Tech-Priest's INT bonus rounds. Allies gain +(2 × INT bonus)% increased dodge for (1 + INT bonus) rounds.

This ability affects both allies and enemies: Allies: {g|Encyclopedia:Recoil}recoil{/g} is reduced by half for 1 round. Allies' {g|Encyclopedia:DodgeGlossary}dodge{/g} is increased by +{uip|Percent|a01295a67a9a46579e46c3073d6a9aa9}% for 1 round. If the target has the {g|f:ed0acc1731834a89bda8cc52ec769e3d}Reject the Flesh{/g} or {g|f:780497b04a0944e59cb57e68bb9775c4}Ferrum Sanctum{/g} feature, or if the target is a mechanism or a machine, it makes a check with a −{uip|Penalty|a01295a67a9a46579e46c3073d6a9aa9} penalty.

languages.text: 此{g|Encyclopedia:Ability}能力{/g}对敌我双方均生效： 盟友：{g|Encyclopedia:Recoil}后坐力{/g}减半，持续1{g|Encyclopedia:Round}轮{/g}。盟友的{g|Encyclopedia:DodgeGlossary}闪避{/g}提高{uip|Percent|a01295a67a9a46579e46c3073d6a9aa9}%，持续1轮。 敌人：闪避降低{uip|Percent|a01295a67a9a46579e46c3073d6a9aa9}%，持续1轮。敌人必须通过一项{g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerIntelligence}智力{/g}{g|Encyclopedia:ResistanceTest}抗性检定{/g}，否则承受1层{g|f:e6ed7e168bfb4adb9fc73fb07b5e7020}惊厥{/g}效果，持续至战斗结束。若目标拥有{g|f:ed0acc1731834a89bda8cc52ec769e3d}拒绝实肉{/g}或{g|f:780497b04a0944e59cb57e68bb9775c4}钢铁圣所{/g}特性，或者目标是机械装置或机器时，目标在进行检定时承受{uip|Penalty|a01295a67a9a46579e46c3073d6a9aa9}{g|Encyclopedia:Penalty}减值{/g}。

traits.locale_text: 此{g|Encyclopedia:Ability}能力{/g}对敌我双方均生效： 盟友：{g|Encyclopedia:Recoil}后坐力{/g}减半，持续1{g|Encyclopedia:Round}轮{/g}。盟友的{g|Encyclopedia:DodgeGlossary}闪避{/g}提高{uip|Percent|a01295a67a9a46579e46c3073d6a9aa9}%，持续1轮。 敌人：闪避降低{uip|Percent|a01295a67a9a46579e46c3073d6a9aa9}%，持续1轮。敌人必须通过一项{g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerIntelligence}智力{/g}{g|Encyclopedia:ResistanceTest}抗性检定{/g}，否则承受1层{g|f:e6ed7e168bfb4adb9fc73fb07b5e7020}惊厥{/g}效果，持续至战斗结束。若目标拥有{g|f:ed0acc1731834a89bda8cc52ec769e3d}拒绝实肉{/g}或{g|f:780497b04a0944e59cb57e68bb9775c4}钢铁圣所{/g}特性，或者目标是机械装置或机器时，目标在进行检定时承受{uip|Penalty|a01295a67a9a46579e46c3073d6a9aa9}{g|Encyclopedia:Penalty}减值{/g}。

极大范围内所有角色的武器都会获得额外效果： 所有盟友的武器：{g|Encyclopedia:Recoil}后坐力{/g}减半，持续{g|Encyclopedia:Round}轮{/g}数等同于技术神甫的{g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerIntelligence}智力{/g}{g|Encyclopedia:Bonus}加值{/g}。所有敌人的{g|Encyclopedia:DodgeGlossary}闪避{/g}降低（2×智力加值）%，此{g|Encyclopedia:Penalty}减值{/g}效果持续轮数等同于（1+智力加值）。 所有敌人的武器：后坐力提高一半，持续轮数等同于技术神甫的智力加值。所有盟友的闪避提高（2×智力加值）%，持续轮数等同于（1+智力加值）。

极大范围内所有角色的武器都会获得额外效果： 所有盟友的武器：{g|Encyclopedia:Recoil}后坐力{/g}减半，持续轮数等同于{uip|Round|a01295a67a9a46579e46c3073d6a9aa9}。所有敌人的{g|Encyclopedia:DodgeGlossary}闪避{/g}降低（2×智力加值）%，此减值效果持续轮数等同于（1+智力加值）。 所有敌人的武器：后坐力提高一半，持续轮数等同于技术神甫的智力加值。所有盟友的闪避提高（2×智力加值）%，持续轮数等同于（1+智力加值）。

languages.text: Esta {g|Encyclopedia:Ability}capacidad{/g} afecta tanto a aliados como a enemigos: Aliados: reduce el {g|Encyclopedia:Recoil}retroceso{/g} a la mitad durante 1 {g|Encyclopedia:Round}asalto{/g}. La {g|Encyclopedia:DodgeGlossary}esquiva{/g} de los aliados aumenta en un +{uip|Percent|a01295a67a9a46579e46c3073d6a9aa9} % durante 1 asalto. Enemigos: reduce la esquiva en un −{uip|Percent|a01295a67a9a46579e46c3073d6a9aa9} % durante 1 asalto. Los enemigos deben superar una {g|Encyclopedia:ResistanceTest}prueba de fortaleza{/g} de {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerIntelligence}Inteligencia{/g} o recibir +1 acumulación de {g|f:e6ed7e168bfb4adb9fc73fb07b5e7020}сonvulsión{/g} hasta el final del combate. Si el objetivo tiene la característica {g|f:ed0acc1731834a89bda8cc52ec769e3d}Rechazo cárnico{/g} o {g|f:780497b04a0944e59cb57e68bb9775c4}Ferrum sanctum{/g}, o si el objetivo es un mecanismo o máquina, realiza la prueba con una {g|Encyclopedia:Penalty}penalización{/g} de −{uip|Penalty|a01295a67a9a46579e46c3073d6a9aa9}.
languages.original_text: This {g|Encyclopedia:Ability}ability{/g} affects both allies and enemies: Allies: {g|Encyclopedia:Recoil}recoil{/g} is reduced by half for 1 {g|Encyclopedia:Round}round{/g}. Allies' {g|Encyclopedia:DodgeGlossary}dodge{/g} is increased by +{uip|Percent|a01295a67a9a46579e46c3073d6a9aa9}% for 1 round. Enemies: dodge is reduced by −{uip|Percent|a01295a67a9a46579e46c3073d6a9aa9}% for 1 round. Enemies must pass an {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerIntelligence}Intelligence{/g} {g|Encyclopedia:ResistanceTest}resistance test{/g} or suffer +1 stack of {g|f:e6ed7e168bfb4adb9fc73fb07b5e7020}сonvulsion{/g} until the end of combat. If the target has the {g|f:ed0acc1731834a89bda8cc52ec769e3d}Reject the Flesh{/g} or {g|f:780497b04a0944e59cb57e68bb9775c4}Ferrum Sanctum{/g} feature, or if the target is a mechanism or a machine, it makes a check with a −{uip|Penalty|a01295a67a9a46579e46c3073d6a9aa9} {g|Encyclopedia:Penalty}penalty{/g}.

traits.locale_text: Esta {g|Encyclopedia:Ability}capacidad{/g} afecta tanto a aliados como a enemigos: Aliados: reduce el {g|Encyclopedia:Recoil}retroceso{/g} a la mitad durante 1 {g|Encyclopedia:Round}asalto{/g}. La {g|Encyclopedia:DodgeGlossary}esquiva{/g} de los aliados aumenta en un +{uip|Percent|a01295a67a9a46579e46c3073d6a9aa9} % durante 1 asalto. Enemigos: reduce la esquiva en un −{uip|Percent|a01295a67a9a46579e46c3073d6a9aa9} % durante 1 asalto. Los enemigos deben superar una {g|Encyclopedia:ResistanceTest}prueba de fortaleza{/g} de {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerIntelligence}Inteligencia{/g} o recibir +1 acumulación de {g|f:e6ed7e168bfb4adb9fc73fb07b5e7020}сonvulsión{/g} hasta el final del combate. Si el objetivo tiene la característica {g|f:ed0acc1731834a89bda8cc52ec769e3d}Rechazo cárnico{/g} o {g|f:780497b04a0944e59cb57e68bb9775c4}Ferrum sanctum{/g}, o si el objetivo es un mecanismo o máquina, realiza la prueba con una {g|Encyclopedia:Penalty}penalización{/g} de −{uip|Penalty|a01295a67a9a46579e46c3073d6a9aa9}.

Todas las armas en un gran radio ganan efectos adicionales: Armas de aliados: se reduce el {g|Encyclopedia:Recoil}retroceso{/g} a la mitad durante un número de asaltos igual a la {uip|Round|a01295a67a9a46579e46c3073d6a9aa9}. Los enemigos sufren una penalización del −(2 × bonificación por INT) % a su {g|Encyclopedia:DodgeGlossary}esquiva{/g} durante (1 + bonificación por INT) asaltos. Armas de enemigos: se aumenta el retroceso en la mitad durante un número de asaltos igual a la bonificación por INT del tecnosacerdote. Los aliados ganan +(2 × bonificación por INT) % más de esquiva durante (1 + bonificación por INT) asaltos.

languages.text: 広範囲なエリアにあるすべての武器に追加エフェクトが付与される。 味方の武器：{uip|Round|a01295a67a9a46579e46c3073d6a9aa9}ラウンドの間、{g|Encyclopedia:Recoil}反動{/g}が半減する。{uip|Round|a01295a67a9a46579e46c3073d6a9aa9}ラウンドの間、敵の{g|Encyclopedia:DodgeGlossary}回避率{/g}が−{uip|Percent|a01295a67a9a46579e46c3073d6a9aa9}%低下する。 敵の武器：{uip|Rounds|a01295a67a9a46579e46c3073d6a9aa9}ラウンドの間、反動が半分増加する。{uip|Round|a01295a67a9a46579e46c3073d6a9aa9}ラウンドの間、味方の回避率が+{uip|Percent|a01295a67a9a46579e46c3073d6a9aa9}%増加する。
languages.original_text: All weapons in a huge area gain additional effects: Allies' Weapons: {g|Encyclopedia:Recoil}recoil{/g} is reduced by half for {uip|Round|a01295a67a9a46579e46c3073d6a9aa9} rounds. Enemies' {g|Encyclopedia:DodgeGlossary}dodge{/g} is reduced by −{uip|Percent|a01295a67a9a46579e46c3073d6a9aa9}% for {uip|Round|a01295a67a9a46579e46c3073d6a9aa9} rounds. Enemies' Weapons: recoil is increased by half for {uip|Rounds|a01295a67a9a46579e46c3073d6a9aa9} rounds. Allies' dodge is increased by +{uip|Percent|a01295a67a9a46579e46c3073d6a9aa9}% for {uip|Round|a01295a67a9a46579e46c3073d6a9aa9} rounds.

traits.locale_text: 広範囲なエリアにあるすべての武器に追加エフェクトが付与される。 味方の武器：{uip|Round|a01295a67a9a46579e46c3073d6a9aa9}ラウンドの間、{g|Encyclopedia:Recoil}反動{/g}が半減する。{uip|Round|a01295a67a9a46579e46c3073d6a9aa9}ラウンドの間、敵の{g|Encyclopedia:DodgeGlossary}回避率{/g}が−{uip|Percent|a01295a67a9a46579e46c3073d6a9aa9}%低下する。 敵の武器：{uip|Rounds|a01295a67a9a46579e46c3073d6a9aa9}ラウンドの間、反動が半分増加する。{uip|Round|a01295a67a9a46579e46c3073d6a9aa9}ラウンドの間、味方の回避率が+{uip|Percent|a01295a67a9a46579e46c3073d6a9aa9}%増加する。

広範囲なエリアにあるすべての武器に追加エフェクトが付与される： 味方の武器： 技術司祭の{g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerIntelligence}INT{/g}{g|Encyclopedia:Bonus}ボーナス{/g}{g|Encyclopedia:Round}ラウンド{/g}で{g|Encyclopedia:Recoil}反動{/g}が半減する。敵の{g|Encyclopedia:DodgeGlossary}回避率{/g}が（1 + INTボーナス）ラウンドの間、−（2 × INTボーナス）%の{g|Encyclopedia:Penalty}ペナルティ{/g}を受ける。 敵の武器：技術司祭のINTボーナスラウンドで反動が半分増加する。味方の回避率が（1 + INTボーナス）ラウンドの間、+（2 × INTボーナス）%増加する。

広範囲なエリアにあるすべての武器に追加エフェクトが付与される： 味方の武器：{uip|Round|a01295a67a9a46579e46c3073d6a9aa9}と同等のラウンド数の間{g|Encyclopedia:Recoil}反動{/g}が半減する。敵の{g|Encyclopedia:DodgeGlossary}回避率{/g}が(1 + INTボーナス)ラウンドの間、−(2 × INTボーナス)%のペナルティを受ける。 敵の武器：技術司祭のINTボーナスと同じ値のラウンド数の間、反動が半分増加する。味方の回避率が(1 + INTボーナス)ラウンドの間、+(2 × INTボーナス)%増加する。

languages.text: Эта {g|Encyclopedia:Ability}способность{/g} влияет и на союзников, и на противников: Союзники: {g|Encyclopedia:Recoil}отдача{/g} уменьшается вдвое на 1 {g|Encyclopedia:Round}раунд{/g}. Союзники получают +{uip|Percent|a01295a67a9a46579e46c3073d6a9aa9}% к {g|Encyclopedia:DodgeGlossary}уклонению{/g} на 1 раунд. Противники: получают −{uip|Percent|a01295a67a9a46579e46c3073d6a9aa9}% к уклонению на 1 раунд. Противники должны пройти проверку {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerIntelligence}Интеллекта{/g} на {g|Encyclopedia:ResistanceTest}сопротивление{/g}, а в случае провала получить +1 уровень {g|f:e6ed7e168bfb4adb9fc73fb07b5e7020}конвульсии{/g} до конца боя. Цели со свойствами {g|f:ed0acc1731834a89bda8cc52ec769e3d}Отбрось плоть{/g} или {g|f:780497b04a0944e59cb57e68bb9775c4}Священное железо{/g} и цели, являющиеся машиной или механизмом, проходят проверку со {g|Encyclopedia:Penalty}штрафом{/g} {uip|Penalty|a01295a67a9a46579e46c3073d6a9aa9}.

Allies' {g|Encyclopedia:DodgeGlossary}dodge{/g} is increased by +{uip|Percent|a01295a67a9a46579e46c3073d6a9aa9}% for 1 round. Enemies: dodge is reduced by −{uip|Percent|a01295a67a9a46579e46c3073d6a9aa9}% for 1 round. Enemies must pass an {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerIntelligence}Intelligence{/g} {g|Encyclopedia:ResistanceTest}resistance test{/g} or suffer +1 stack of {g|f:e6ed7e168bfb4adb9fc73fb07b5e7020}сonvulsion{/g} until the end of combat. If the target has the {g|f:ed0acc1731834a89bda8cc52ec769e3d}Reject the Flesh{/g} or {g|f:780497b04a0944e59cb57e68bb9775c4}Ferrum Sanctum{/g} feature, or if the target is a mechanism or a machine, it makes a check with a −{uip|Penalty|a01295a67a9a46579e46c3073d6a9aa9} {g|Encyclopedia:Penalty}penalty{/g}.

traits.locale_text: Все оружие в обширной области получает дополнительные эффекты: Оружие союзников: {g|Encyclopedia:Recoil}отдача{/g} уменьшается вдвое на {uip|Round|a01295a67a9a46579e46c3073d6a9aa9} раундов. Противники получают −{uip|Percent|a01295a67a9a46579e46c3073d6a9aa9}% к {g|Encyclopedia:DodgeGlossary}уклонению{/g} на {uip|Round|a01295a67a9a46579e46c3073d6a9aa9} раундов. Оружие противников: отдача увеличивается в полтора раза на {unit_stat|WarhammerIntelligence|bonus} раундов. Союзники получают +{uip|Percent|a01295a67a9a46579e46c3073d6a9aa9}% к уклонению на {uip|Round|a01295a67a9a46579e46c3073d6a9aa9} раундов.

Все оружие в обширной области получает дополнительные эффекты: Оружие союзников: {g|Encyclopedia:Recoil}отдача{/g} уменьшается вдвое на {uip|Round|a01295a67a9a46579e46c3073d6a9aa9} раундов. Противники получают −{uip|Percent|a01295a67a9a46579e46c3073d6a9aa9}% к {g|Encyclopedia:DodgeGlossary}уклонению{/g} на {uip|Round|a01295a67a9a46579e46c3073d6a9aa9} раундов. Оружие противников: отдача увеличивается в полтора раза на {unit_stat|WarhammerIntelligence|bonus} раундов. Союзники получают +{uip|Percent|a01295a67a9a46579e46c3073d6a9aa9}% к уклонению на {uip|Round|a01295a67a9a46579e46c3073d6a9aa9} раундов.

Все оружие в обширной области получает дополнительные эффекты: Оружие союзников: {g|Encyclopedia:Recoil}отдача{/g} уменьшается вдвое на {uip|Round|a01295a67a9a46579e46c3073d6a9aa9} раундов. Противники получают штраф −(2 × бонус ИНТ)% к {g|Encyclopedia:DodgeGlossary}уклонению{/g} на (1 + бонус ИНТ) раундов. Оружие противников: отдача увеличивается в полтора раза на бонус ИНТ техножреца раундов. Союзники получают +(2 × бонус ИНТ)% к шансу уклонения на (1 + бонус ИНТ) раундов.

languages.text: Diese {g|Encyclopedia:Ability}Fähigkeit{/g} wirkt sich auf Verbündete und Gegner aus: Verbündete: {g|Encyclopedia:Recoil}Rückstoß{/g} wird 1 {g|Encyclopedia:Round}Runde{/g} lang um die Hälfte reduziert. Der {g|Encyclopedia:DodgeGlossary}Ausweichwert{/g} von Verbündeten erhöht sich 1 Runde lang um +{uip|Percent|a01295a67a9a46579e46c3073d6a9aa9} %. Gegner: Ausweichen wird 1 Runde lang um −{uip|Percent|a01295a67a9a46579e46c3073d6a9aa9} % reduziert. Gegner müssen eine {g|Encyclopedia:ResistanceTest}Widerstandsprobe{/g} auf {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerIntelligence}Intelligenz{/g} bestehen, um nicht bis zum Ende des Kampfes mit +1 Stapel {g|f:e6ed7e168bfb4adb9fc73fb07b5e7020}Konvulsion{/g} belegt zu werden. Wenn das Ziel mit {g|f:ed0acc1731834a89bda8cc52ec769e3d}Ablehnung des Fleisches{/g} oder {g|f:780497b04a0944e59cb57e68bb9775c4}Ferrum sanctum{/g} belegt oder ein Mechanismus oder eine Maschine ist, macht es eine Probe mit einem {g|Encyclopedia:Penalty}Abzug{/g} von −{uip|Penalty|a01295a67a9a46579e46c3073d6a9aa9}.
languages.original_text: This {g|Encyclopedia:Ability}ability{/g} affects both allies and enemies: Allies: {g|Encyclopedia:Recoil}recoil{/g} is reduced by half for 1 {g|Encyclopedia:Round}round{/g}. Allies' {g|Encyclopedia:DodgeGlossary}dodge{/g} is increased by +{uip|Percent|a01295a67a9a46579e46c3073d6a9aa9}% for 1 round. Enemies: dodge is reduced by −{uip|Percent|a01295a67a9a46579e46c3073d6a9aa9}% for 1 round. Enemies must pass an {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerIntelligence}Intelligence{/g} {g|Encyclopedia:ResistanceTest}resistance test{/g} or suffer +1 stack of {g|f:e6ed7e168bfb4adb9fc73fb07b5e7020}сonvulsion{/g} until the end of combat. If the target has the {g|f:ed0acc1731834a89bda8cc52ec769e3d}Reject the Flesh{/g} or {g|f:780497b04a0944e59cb57e68bb9775c4}Ferrum Sanctum{/g} feature, or if the target is a mechanism or a machine, it makes a check with a −{uip|Penalty|a01295a67a9a46579e46c3073d6a9aa9} {g|Encyclopedia:Penalty}penalty{/g}.

traits.locale_text: Diese {g|Encyclopedia:Ability}Fähigkeit{/g} wirkt sich auf Verbündete und Gegner aus: Verbündete: {g|Encyclopedia:Recoil}Rückstoß{/g} wird 1 {g|Encyclopedia:Round}Runde{/g} lang um die Hälfte reduziert. Der {g|Encyclopedia:DodgeGlossary}Ausweichwert{/g} von Verbündeten erhöht sich 1 Runde lang um +{uip|Percent|a01295a67a9a46579e46c3073d6a9aa9} %. Gegner: Ausweichen wird 1 Runde lang um −{uip|Percent|a01295a67a9a46579e46c3073d6a9aa9} % reduziert. Gegner müssen eine {g|Encyclopedia:ResistanceTest}Widerstandsprobe{/g} auf {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerIntelligence}Intelligenz{/g} bestehen, um nicht bis zum Ende des Kampfes mit +1 Stapel {g|f:e6ed7e168bfb4adb9fc73fb07b5e7020}Konvulsion{/g} belegt zu werden. Wenn das Ziel mit {g|f:ed0acc1731834a89bda8cc52ec769e3d}Ablehnung des Fleisches{/g} oder {g|f:780497b04a0944e59cb57e68bb9775c4}Ferrum sanctum{/g} belegt oder ein Mechanismus oder eine Maschine ist, macht es eine Probe mit einem {g|Encyclopedia:Penalty}Abzug{/g} von −{uip|Penalty|a01295a67a9a46579e46c3073d6a9aa9}.

Alle Waffen in einem riesigen Gebiet erhalten zusätzliche Effekte: Waffen von Verbündeten: {g|Encyclopedia:Recoil}Rückstoß{/g} wird {uip|Round|a01295a67a9a46579e46c3073d6a9aa9} {g|Encyclopedia:Round}Runden{/g} lang um die Hälfte reduziert. Gegner erhalten (1 + INT-Bonus) Runden lang einen {g|Encyclopedia:Penalty}Abzug{/g} von −(2 × INT-Bonus) % auf {g|Encyclopedia:DodgeGlossary}Ausweichen{/g}. Waffen von Gegnern: Rückstoß INT-Bonus des Techpriesters Runden lang um die Hälfte erhöht. Verbündete haben (1 + INT-Bonus) Runden lang +(2 × INT-Bonus) % Ausweichen.

languages.text: Cette {g|Encyclopedia:Ability}capacité{/g} affecte les alliés et les ennemis : Alliés : le {g|Encyclopedia:Recoil}recul{/g} est réduit de moitié pendant 1 {g|Encyclopedia:Round}round{/g}. Les alliés obtiennent un bonus d'{g|Encyclopedia:DodgeGlossary}esquive{/g} de +{uip|Percent|a01295a67a9a46579e46c3073d6a9aa9} % pendant 1 round. Ennemis : l'esquive est réduite de −{uip|Percent|a01295a67a9a46579e46c3073d6a9aa9} % pendant 1 round. Les ennemis doivent réussir un {g|Encyclopedia:ResistanceTest}test de résistance{/g} d'{g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerIntelligence}Intelligence{/g}. En cas d'échec, ils subissent +1 cumul de {g|f:e6ed7e168bfb4adb9fc73fb07b5e7020}convulsion{/g} jusqu'à la fin du combat. Si la cible a la caractéristique {g|f:ed0acc1731834a89bda8cc52ec769e3d}Rejet de la chair{/g} ou {g|f:780497b04a0944e59cb57e68bb9775c4}Ferrum Sanctum{/g}, ou que la cible est un mécanisme ou une machine, elle doit passer un test avec une {g|Encyclopedia:Penalty}pénalité{/g} de −{uip|Penalty|a01295a67a9a46579e46c3073d6a9aa9}.
languages.original_text: This {g|Encyclopedia:Ability}ability{/g} affects both allies and enemies: Allies: {g|Encyclopedia:Recoil}recoil{/g} is reduced by half for 1 {g|Encyclopedia:Round}round{/g}. Allies' {g|Encyclopedia:DodgeGlossary}dodge{/g} is increased by +{uip|Percent|a01295a67a9a46579e46c3073d6a9aa9}% for 1 round. Enemies: dodge is reduced by −{uip|Percent|a01295a67a9a46579e46c3073d6a9aa9}% for 1 round. Enemies must pass an {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerIntelligence}Intelligence{/g} {g|Encyclopedia:ResistanceTest}resistance test{/g} or suffer +1 stack of {g|f:e6ed7e168bfb4adb9fc73fb07b5e7020}сonvulsion{/g} until the end of combat. If the target has the {g|f:ed0acc1731834a89bda8cc52ec769e3d}Reject the Flesh{/g} or {g|f:780497b04a0944e59cb57e68bb9775c4}Ferrum Sanctum{/g} feature, or if the target is a mechanism or a machine, it makes a check with a −{uip|Penalty|a01295a67a9a46579e46c3073d6a9aa9} {g|Encyclopedia:Penalty}penalty{/g}.

traits.locale_text: Cette {g|Encyclopedia:Ability}capacité{/g} affecte les alliés et les ennemis : Alliés : le {g|Encyclopedia:Recoil}recul{/g} est réduit de moitié pendant 1 {g|Encyclopedia:Round}round{/g}. Les alliés obtiennent un bonus d'{g|Encyclopedia:DodgeGlossary}esquive{/g} de +{uip|Percent|a01295a67a9a46579e46c3073d6a9aa9} % pendant 1 round. Ennemis : l'esquive est réduite de −{uip|Percent|a01295a67a9a46579e46c3073d6a9aa9} % pendant 1 round. Les ennemis doivent réussir un {g|Encyclopedia:ResistanceTest}test de résistance{/g} d'{g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerIntelligence}Intelligence{/g}. En cas d'échec, ils subissent +1 cumul de {g|f:e6ed7e168bfb4adb9fc73fb07b5e7020}convulsion{/g} jusqu'à la fin du combat. Si la cible a la caractéristique {g|f:ed0acc1731834a89bda8cc52ec769e3d}Rejet de la chair{/g} ou {g|f:780497b04a0944e59cb57e68bb9775c4}Ferrum Sanctum{/g}, ou que la cible est un mécanisme ou une machine, elle doit passer un test avec une {g|Encyclopedia:Penalty}pénalité{/g} de −{uip|Penalty|a01295a67a9a46579e46c3073d6a9aa9}.

Toutes les armes situées dans une très large zone bénéficient d'effets supplémentaires : Armes des alliés : le {g|Encyclopedia:Recoil}recul{/g} est réduit de moitié pendant {uip|Round|a01295a67a9a46579e46c3073d6a9aa9} rounds. Les ennemis subissent une pénalité d'{g|Encyclopedia:DodgeGlossary}esquive{/g} de −(2 × bonus d'INT) % pendant (1 + bonus d'INT) rounds. Armes des ennemis : le recul augmente de moitié pendant bonus d'INT du technoprêtre rounds. Les alliés obtiennent un bonus d'esquive de +(2 × bonus d'INT) % pendant (1 + bonus d'INT) rounds.

languages.text: Bu {g|Encyclopedia:Ability}kabiliyet{/g}, hem dost hem de düşman birimleri etkiler: Dost birimler: {g|Encyclopedia:Recoil}Geri tepme{/g} değeri yarıya düşer. Etkisi 1 {g|Encyclopedia:Round}raunt{/g} sürer. Dost birimlerin {g|Encyclopedia:DodgeGlossary}kaçınma{/g} değeri +%{uip|Percent|a01295a67a9a46579e46c3073d6a9aa9} artar. Etkisi 1 raunt sürer. Düşman birimler: Kaçınma değeri, %{uip|Percent|a01295a67a9a46579e46c3073d6a9aa9} azalır. Etkisi 1 raunt sürer. Düşmanlar, {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerIntelligence}Zekâ{/g} {g|Encyclopedia:ResistanceTest}direnç testinden{/g} geçmelidir. Aksi takdirde +1 {g|f:e6ed7e168bfb4adb9fc73fb07b5e7020}kasılma{/g} birikimine maruz kalırlar. Etkisi çatışma sonuna dek sürer. Hedef, {g|f:ed0acc1731834a89bda8cc52ec769e3d}Etten Kurtul{/g} ya da {g|f:780497b04a0944e59cb57e68bb9775c4}Demir Kutak{/g} özelliğine sahipse veya bir mekanizma ya da makine ise bu teste −{uip|Penalty|a01295a67a9a46579e46c3073d6a9aa9} {g|Encyclopedia:Penalty}ceza puanıyla{/g} girer.

If the target has the {g|f:ed0acc1731834a89bda8cc52ec769e3d}Reject the Flesh{/g} or {g|f:780497b04a0944e59cb57e68bb9775c4}Ferrum Sanctum{/g} feature, or if the target is a mechanism or a machine, it makes a check with a −{uip|Penalty|a01295a67a9a46579e46c3073d6a9aa9} {g|Encyclopedia:Penalty}penalty{/g}.

traits.locale_text: Geniş bir alandaki tüm silahlar ilave etkiler kazanır: Dost Birimlerin Silahları: {g|Encyclopedia:Recoil}Geri tepme{/g}, {uip|Round|a01295a67a9a46579e46c3073d6a9aa9}nun yarısı kadar azalır. Düşmanlar, {g|Encyclopedia:DodgeGlossary}kaçınma{/g} değerlerine −%(2 × ZEK bonusu) kadar ceza puanı alırlar. Bu etki (1 + ZEK bonusu) raunt sürer. Düşmanların Silahları: Geri tepme, Tekno Rahip'in ZEK bonusunun yarısı kadar artar. Dost birimlerin kaçınma değerleri +%(2 × ZEK bonusu) kadar artar. Bu etki (1 + ZEK bonusu) raunt sürer.

Bu {g|Encyclopedia:Ability}kabiliyet{/g}, hem dost hem de düşman birimleri etkiler: Dost birimler: {g|Encyclopedia:Recoil}Geri tepme{/g} değeri yarıya düşer. Etkisi 1 {g|Encyclopedia:Round}raunt{/g} sürer. Dost birimlerin {g|Encyclopedia:DodgeGlossary}kaçınma{/g} değeri +%{uip|Percent|a01295a67a9a46579e46c3073d6a9aa9} artar. Etkisi 1 raunt sürer. Düşman birimler: Kaçınma değeri, %{uip|Percent|a01295a67a9a46579e46c3073d6a9aa9} azalır. Etkisi 1 raunt sürer. Düşmanlar, {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerIntelligence}Zekâ{/g} {g|Encyclopedia:ResistanceTest}direnç testinden{/g} geçmelidir. Aksi takdirde +1 {g|f:e6ed7e168bfb4adb9fc73fb07b5e7020}kasılma{/g} birikimine maruz kalırlar. Etkisi çatışma sonuna dek sürer. Hedef, {g|f:ed0acc1731834a89bda8cc52ec769e3d}Etten Kurtul{/g} ya da {g|f:780497b04a0944e59cb57e68bb9775c4}Demir Kutak{/g} özelliğine sahipse veya bir mekanizma ya da makine ise bu teste −{uip|Penalty|a01295a67a9a46579e46c3073d6a9aa9} {g|Encyclopedia:Penalty}ceza puanıyla{/g} girer.

languages.text:
Allies and enemies gains the following bonuses and penalty:
Allies' weapon {g|Encyclopedia:Recoil}recoil{/g} is reduced by half for 1 round.
Allies' {g|Encyclopedia:DodgeGlossary}dodge{/g} is increased by +{uip|Percent|a01295a67a9a46579e46c3073d6a9aa9}% for 1 round.
Enemies' dodge is reduced by -{uip|Percent|a01295a67a9a46579e46c3073d6a9aa9}% for 1 round.
Enemies must pass an {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerIntelligence}Intelligence{/g} {g|Encyclopedia:ResistanceTest}resistance test{/g} or suffer +1 stack of {g|f:e6ed7e168bfb4adb9fc73fb07b5e7020}Convulsion{/g} until the end of combat. If the target has {g|f:ed0acc1731834a89bda8cc52ec769e3d}Reject the Flesh{/g} or {g|f:780497b04a0944e59cb57e68bb9775c4}Ferrum Sanctum{/g} feature, or it the target is a mechanism or a machine, it makes a check with a -{uip|Penalty|a01295a67a9a46579e46c3073d6a9aa9} penalty.
